summary: Project involves an event management platform with an organiser dashboard featuring booking requests, events, and portfolio image upload sections.
architectural_notes: Organiser dashboard section order: Events → Portfolio Image Upload → Booking Requests

existing_features.title: In the OrganizerDashboard page, reorder the dashboard sections so that the booking requests section appears after (below) both the events section and the portfolio image upload section. The final order from top to bottom should be: (1) profile view/edit, (2) events, (3) portfolio image upload, (4) booking requests.

new_feature_requests.summary: Move booking requests section to the bottom of the organiser dashboard, below events and portfolio image upload

projectName: Move booking requests to bottom of organiser dashboard
